PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hall for Maria Tavares.

The Court stated that it had a number of concerns about the will, that the will clearly appears to be altered and pointed out all of the dates that were altered. Mr. Hall stated that this is the only document they have, that Maria is an independent contractor that was hired to assist with house cleaning periodically and other household chores (shopping), that the Decedent received medical care and in house support through Kaiser, and that Maria was never paid for in house care. In addition, Mr. Hall stated that he spoke to the two Witnesses, that there is no opposition, that the only assets are the house, the pay on death accounts and the contents of the house. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). The issue of whether bond will be required is to be determined. The will is admitted.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
